description: Per-observer anatomy: finite support, visible record/object packets, modular clock frames, subjective camera linkage, and algebra-control linkage.

overlapRepairDynamics.claimBoundary: Measured per-cycle mismatch/repair intensity on shared observer supports; a visualization diagnostic of overlap repair, not a physics receipt.

overlapAnatomy.claimBoundary: observer-facing consensus readout; tracks what finite patch/cap observers can see before any third-person bulk embedding is inferred

claimBoundary: Observer anatomy exposes only exported visible support/readout structure. It does not include hidden representatives or promote neutral-bulk claims.
